design_philosophy.goal: Information clarity and functional authority. The dashboard must answer 'Is everything okay?' instantly with high-contrast, strict grids.
key_principles: No full-screen gradients. Use monochrome with strict functional colors.
Hard borders (1px) for UI cards, minimal border-radius (0px to 2px max).
Use monospaced fonts for numerical data and serial numbers to ensure perfect alignment.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-950 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-200
buttons.outline: border border-slate-200 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 rounded-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-200 text-slate-900

components.inputs: w-full border border-slate-200 rounded-sm px-3 py-2 text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-950 focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-200
components.th: border-b border-slate-200 py-3 px-4 font-bold text-slate-900 bg-slate-50

backgrounds.description: Modern residential complex used for login/register page background split layout

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Swiss Brutalist' vibe. High contrast, sharp edges (rounded-sm max), generous inner padding for cards (p-6).
Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (Tables, Modals, Select), but override default radius to 'rounded-sm' and shadows to flat minimalist 'shadow-sm'. Use plain HTML for standard layouts.
For financial numbers, invoice serials (INV-YYYYMM-XXXX), and meter readings, MUST use the `font-mono` family (IBM Plex Mono) for perfect alignment.
Place the North Star Metric (Total Uncollected or Monthly Revenue) at the top-left of the Dashboard Grid.
Use status colors strictly for status indicators (Paid=Green, Pending=Yellow, Overdue=Red).
For PDF generation, ensure a clean layout matching the brand, clearly showing the breakdown: Rent, Electricity (End-Start * Rate), Water, Deposit, Total.
Implement Multi-language support (ID, EN, CN, KH) with a dropdown switcher in the header.
Use JWT-based custom auth. The login page should use a split layout with the auth_background image.
Implement WebSockets for real-time status updates on the dashboard table.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-billing-btn').
Use .js files instead of .tsx where possible.
